title: Repeat
text: Repeat Repeat interval for auto-repeat behavior, in milliseconds. The default is 250 (four repetitions per second). Repeat = Milliseconds | Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Delay and Acceleration Description To disable auto-repeat, specify zero (0).The default is 250. Auto-repeat behavior starts after the interval specified by the Delay property and can be accelerated by the percentage specified in Acceleration . Applies To uspinbutton (SpinButton) Related Links Acceleration (Accel) Rate at which the value of the spin button is incremented, expressed as a percentage. Default is 5. Delay The time in milliseconds between the user clicking a button and the start of the auto-repeat. Default is 500 milliseconds (half a second). Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
